title: Analytics - Fit Test Competed
scenario: Fit Test completion event is logged to Firebase with default analytics elements and Device PID on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and select the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Fit Test.
4. Complete the Fit Test process (follow on-screen prompts to finish the test successfully).
5. After completing the Fit Test, open the Firebase console and navigate to the 'Fit Test Completed' event page.

6. Confirm the Firebase page displays properly with default elements: event graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
7. Verify that the Device PID is included in the event data.
8. Wait for some time (allow Firebase event propagation), then return to the Fit Test tab in the Poly Studio Mobile app and complete the process again.
9. After some time, check the Firebase console again and confirm that the event count for the related elements has increased.
expected: The 'Fit Test Completed' event is logged in Firebase with all default elements (event graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) and Device PID. The event count increases after completing additional Fit Tests.
